title: Paper clay fairy door miniature
notes: A freestanding arched door approximately 100 mm tall, 60 mm wide, 8 mm thick. Carved door panels, a small round knocker coil, a knob, hinges, and a letterbox. Backed with a flat slab so it stands upright against a wall or sits at the base of a tree. Paper clay enables thin carved detailing without cracking. PVA sealed; painted with acrylics for a moss-covered, weathered wood effect.
